blended.narrative: Whitewater is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,051 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
